skills.name: Deep Research
skills.description: Multi-agent parallel research orchestrator using MECE decomposition — 90.2% better than single-agent

skills.name: Verification Loops
skills.description: Spawn reviewer agents to audit output, then resolver agents to fix issues. Implement → Review → Resolve chain for 2-3x quality improvement.

skills.name: Multi-Agent Consensus
skills.description: Spawn N agents with framing variations to independently analyze a problem, then aggregate by consensus, divergence, and outlier detection.

skills.name: Prompt Contracts
skills.description: Define GOAL, CONSTRAINTS, FORMAT, and FAILURE conditions as a structured contract before execution. Prevents ambiguous deliverables.

skills.name: Agent Chatrooms
skills.description: Multi-round adversarial debate between N agents with distinct roles. Agents read each other's responses and refine positions across rounds.

skills.name: Website Design
skills.description: Quad-mode website skill: Recreation (pixel-perfect from reference), Creation (bold aesthetics from scratch), Hybrid (recreate + improve), Paper-First (import from Paper.design). Paper.design MCP integration for bidirectional visual editing — push HTML to Paper, read back JSX/Tailwind, extract precise design tokens. Single index.html with Tailwind CDN. Automated screenshot comparison loops. Anti-generic guardrails. BM25 design system lookup (67 styles, 161 palettes, 57 font pairings).

skills.name: LinkedIn Content
skills.description: LinkedIn content creation pipeline — story mining via reverse-prompting interview, SIREN framework drafting, virality engineering, and performance tracking

skills.name: Video Director
skills.description: AI video prompt generation for marketing ads — 14 video types across 3 pipelines (Direct, Image-First, Localized). Generates ready-to-paste prompts for Sora, Kling, VEO. Includes HITL review gates, character bibles, seed management, UGC automation, and full production SOP.

skills.name: Autoresearch
skills.description: Autonomous skill optimization via generate → evaluate → mutate → keep/discard loops. Wraps any existing skill in a self-improving loop that simultaneously improves the skill AND produces winning content per client.

skills.name: Transcribe
skills.description: Transcribe video from any URL into text using yt-dlp + faster-whisper

skills.name: YouTube Content
skills.description: Generate complete YouTube descriptions from video transcripts with timestamps, links, and brand-consistent copy

skills.name: Unslop
skills.description: Domain-specific AI pattern detection — generates empirical avoidance profiles by sampling model defaults. Layer 1 of 4-layer de-AI stack.
